heroVertical: Born in Shanghai, raised in Japan
heroTagline:
Between finance and languages,
facing the world.
aboutLede: Born in Shanghai, raised in Japan.
aboutP1: I majored in Chinese at Osaka University's School of Foreign Studies, and after graduating joined a financial-investment startup as its very first employee. My work spans equity and real-estate investment as well as building the corporate foundation — accounting, HR and general affairs — from the ground up.
aboutP2: Combining the Chinese I honed at university with the financial and market-analysis skills I gained on the job, I read primary sources from China and across Asia while standing on the front lines of investment.
aboutP3: On my days off I play the piano or set out on a trip. Music and travel are what keep me going.
profRoots: Born in Shanghai, raised in Japan
c1Body: Equity investing that blends quantitative analysis of financial statements with qualitative analysis of business models, plus management of income properties — growing the funds entrusted to me substantially.
c2Body: Built accounting, finance, HR and general affairs from zero at an early-stage startup, and led the move to documented workflows that lifted the whole team's productivity.
c3Body: Business-level Chinese lets me collect and analyse primary sources — local news, financial disclosures — first-hand, engaging with markets from a global perspective.
pianoLead: I've played the piano since childhood.<br class="sp-only"> Time at the keyboard is when I feel most like myself.
videoSub: YouTube embed or mp4 — either works
travelLead: I love wandering unfamiliar streets — a slowly growing record of the places I've been.
contactLead: For work enquiries or just to say hello — feel free to reach out.
